category_sources: Official GitHub README describes it as a plugin that enhances zsh history search interaction.
source_facts.description: Zsh plugin that enhances history search interaction.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use zsh-history-enquirer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents install and usage.
source_facts.homepage provides the official project documentation site.
repo_sources: Official project homepage is listed in the GitHub repository metadata, and the GitHub README documents the project.
source_facts.source-archive is the npm release; official GitHub repository is the source-control project URL.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include zsh-plugin, zsh-history, history-search, and related history-search tags.
source_facts.description identifies a Zsh history search plugin.
